title: Buz, Buz, Buz
content:
Buz, Buz, Buz--says the Great buzzing Bee.
    Go away butterfly--this flower is for me.
    Why? Why? Why? says the little butterfly,
    If you may sit on this flower, why may'nt I?
meaning:
"Buz, Buz, Buz" is a quintessential example of Clara Doty Bates's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
